channel.title: GitHub GLSL Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of GLSL in GitHub

item.title: SaschaWillems/Vulkan
item.description: Examples and demos for the new Vulkan API

item.title: jebbyk/OSBES-minecraft-bedrock-edition-shader
item.description: shaders for minecraft_pe that uses the latest functionality of OpenGLES 3.0

item.title: Mcbamboo/Nori-Shaders-BE
item.description: a resource pack (shaders) for Minecraft be mobile

item.title: pa1nki113r/Project_Brutality
item.description: This is the primary repository for collaborative efforts between Doom developers on Project Brutality. This is the bleeding-edge version that is constantly being developed on, and not meant in any way shape or form to be representative of the final version of the mod.

item.title: higan-emu/higan
item.description: higan is a multi-system emulator focused on accuracy, preservation, and configurability.

item.title: Open4Es/Open4Es-Shader-Android
item.description: This is a shader can running on Minecraft Java Edition For Phone project which uses GL4ES

item.title: zombye/spectrum
item.description: A Minecraft: Java Edition shaderpack that aims to look and feel "natural"

item.title: patriciogonzalezvivo/thebookofshaders
item.description: Step-by-step guide through the abstract and complex universe of Fragment Shaders.

item.title: bloc97/Anime4K
item.description: A High-Quality Real Time Upscaler for Anime Video

item.title: ekzhang/graphics-workshop
item.description: Learn computer graphics by writing GPU shaders!

item.title: KMFDManic/NESC-SNESC-Modifications
item.description: All of your NES-SNES-Playstation Classic Modification Needs!
